author: Harley M.
pros: Amazing structure and accessibility amazing customer support and things u could do w it
cons: Love love loved it and support team they hsve

description: Completing the order and immediately emailing from the tablet direct to the office is a bonus, no need to do manual scanning of orders and emailing any longer. Cliens orders are processed quicker and they can expect a quicker delivery time
author: Rizah A.
pros: The fact that it is easy to use, increases my productivity and saving me a lot of time having to do manual ordering.
cons: That you cant add more than one product or client at a time. a good idea would be to have a template on the software to download, complete all the relevant info and then upload to pocketsell. Eliminating the need to do everything one at a time
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: The experience I have had is overall good.
author: Lorraine B.
pros: Easy to use, with good features like description boxes. Quick and simple to add and remove products.
cons: When you change prices of products and have an order already inputted waiting to be made up the prices on the order dose not change as well. also the drop down options for payment method could have a customise option.

author: Patrizio S.
pros: Un gestionale davvero comodo, alla portata di tutti sia per la facilità di utilizzo che per l'aspetto economico. Il servizio di sincronizzazione consente facilmente di lavorare su più dispositivi a seconda delle esigenze. Lo consiglio a tutti
cons: Nessuna criticità rilevata, suggerirei solo di poter rinominare il DB
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The software is very affordable and helps to keep costs down while running the company.
author: Tieka V.
pros: It helps the company to manage our stock inventory and orders.
cons: the user interface is hard to learn and use.

description: Ottimo software lo consiglio x chi vuole avere tutto a portata di mano
author: Vincenzo L.
pros: Riesco ad accedere agli ordini con tutti i dispositivi ovunque sono
cons: Si e bloccato una volta ma il team lo ha sistemato subito

description: It automates a lot of the tasks related to my ecommerce business.
author: Frank J.
pros: This software allows you to track your inventory going out and coming in and also allows you to monitor your revenue stream.
cons: there are no negatives regarding this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Gestionale al passo con i tempi!!!
description: Esperienza positiva che spero possa durare nel tempo
author: Matteo M.
pros: Semplicità, immediatezza, chiarezza e trasparenza… tutti aspetti che per il mio lavoro sono essenziali!!!
cons: Non poter assegnare aliquote iva diverse nel solito ordine

description: It is great for keeping track of your stock so you know when stock needs to be replaced.

cons: There are no negatives regarding this software.

description: I really enjoy using this product. It helps me track my income as well as track the trends.

cons: It's all little difficult to customize certain fields and keep the string accurate
